free_text: Transmission and selfindication measurements on U-235
and  Pu-239  in the energy range 2 eV - 20 keV.
Fast pulse Reactor IBR-30 of the 4ZZZDUB
Metallic disks diameter 48 mm in stainless steel
jackets. U-235 layer: thickness 2 mg/cm**2, total
Least squares method and maximum likelihood
Time dependent background was measured by resonance
filters of Ti(0.113 nucl/b), Mn(0.055 nucl/b; 2.2 keV,
Time dependent background was approximated by
Error due to correction for admixtures .

fission cross sections for U-235 and Pu-239 -

sections for 11-21 groups of ABBN nuclear constant set
